debug_info.goal:
Ident : Type u_1
ε : @Graphiti.FinEnv Ident (String × String)
a : List String
⊢ ∃ b,
    a.length = b.length ∧
      (∀ (a' b' : String), (a', b') ∈ a.zip b → ¬Batteries.AssocList.contains (a', b') ε = true) ∧ (a.zip b).Nodup

simp [freshStrings]
  · intro a' b' hmem
    simp only [Batteries.AssocList.contains, Bool.not_eq_true, Batteries.AssocList.any_eq_false]

    simp only [beq_eq_false_iff_ne, ne_eq, Prod.mk.injEq, not_and]
    intro ha' hb'
    subst ha' hb'
    simp only [freshStrings, List.mem_zip, List.mem_map, List.mem_enum] at hmem
    obtain ⟨⟨i, ai⟩, ⟨hi, hai⟩, ⟨j, aj⟩, ⟨hj, haj⟩, hab⟩ := hmem
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at hab
    obtain ⟨ha', hb'⟩ := hab
    subst ha' hb'
    have hb'_len : b'.length = maxLen + j + 1 := by simp [haj]
    have hmaxLen : x.1.2.length ≤ maxLen := by
      have : x.1 ∈ keys := List.mem_map_of_mem (·.1) hx
      simp only [keys] at this
      obtain ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩ := List.mem_map.mp this
      subst hxy
      exact List.foldl_le_of_mem hy (fun _ _ => le_max_right _ _)
    omega
  · simp only [freshStrings, List.zip_map_right, List.map_enum_eq_zipIdx, List.zip_zipIdx]
    apply List.Nodup.map
    · intro ⟨a1, i1⟩ ⟨a2, i2⟩ heq
      simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at heq
      obtain ⟨ha, hi⟩ := heq
      simp only [String.mk.injEq] at hi
      have : i1 = i2 := by
        have h1 : (List.replicate (maxLen + i1 + 1) 'x').length = maxLen + i1 + 1 := List.length_replicate _ _
        have h2 : (List.replicate (maxLen + i2 + 1) 'x').length = maxLen + i2 + 1 := List.length_replicate _ _
        rw [hi] at h1
        omega
      simp [this, ha]
    · exact List.nodup_enum

simp at h, List.nodup_nil⟩
  | cons x xs ih =>
    obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let used : Finset String := 
      (ε.toList.filter (·.1.1 = x)).map (·.1.2) |>.toFinset ∪ 
      ((xs.zip bs).filter (·.1 = x)).map (·.2) |>.toFinset
    have : ∃ y : String, y ∉ used := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have : used.card < (used.card + 1) := Nat.lt_succ_self _
      exact Nat.lt_irrefl _ this
    obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := this

    · simp [hlen]

        have := hy.1 x y
        simp only [Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq, List.any_eq_true, Batteries.AssocList.toList,

      exact hy.2 x y ⟨hmem, rfl⟩ rfl

suffices h : ∃ b, a.length = b.length ∧ (∀ a' b', (a', b') ∈ a.zip b → ¬ε.contains (a', b')) ∧ b.Nodup by
    obtain ⟨b, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := h
    exact ⟨b, hlen, hfresh, List.Nodup.of_map Prod.snd (by simp [List.map_snd_zip, hlen]; exact hnodup)⟩
  induction a with
  | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, fun _ _ h => (List.not_mem_nil _ h).elim, List.nodup_nil⟩
  | cons hd tl ih =>
    obtain ⟨b', hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let bad : Finset String := b'.toFinset ∪ 
      (ε.toList.filter (·.1.1 = hd)).map (·.1.2) |>.toFinset
    obtain ⟨fresh, hfresh_new⟩ := Infinite.exists_not_mem_finset bad
    refine ⟨fresh :: b', by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro a' b'' hmem
      simp only [List.zip_cons_cons, List.mem_cons] at hmem
      cases hmem with
      | inl h =>
        simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
        obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := h
        simp only [Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq, List.any_eq_true, Prod.mk.injEq, 
                   decide_eq_true_eq, not_exists, not_and]
        intro x hx ⟨h1, h2⟩
        have : fresh ∈ bad := by
          simp only [Finset.mem_union, Finset.mem_toFinset, List.mem_map, List.mem_filter]
          right
          exact ⟨((hd, fresh), x.2), ⟨hx, rfl⟩, h2⟩
        exact hfresh_new this
      | inr hmem' => exact hfresh _ _ hmem'
    · simp only [List.nodup_cons]
      refine ⟨?_, hnodup⟩
      intro h
      have : fresh ∈ bad := Finset.mem_union_left _ (List.mem_toFinset.mpr h)
      exact hfresh_new this
sorry

some p.2 else none) |>.toFinset
    let keys : List (String × String) := ε.toList.map Prod.fst
    let usedFromEnv : Finset String := 
      keys.filterMap (fun p => if p.1 = x then some p.2 else none) |>.toFinset
    have : ∃ y : String, y ∉ used ∧ y ∉ usedFromEnv ∧ ¬ε.contains (x, y) := by
      have h : (used ∪ usedFromEnv).Finite := Finset.finite_toSet _
      obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := Infinite.exists_not_mem_finset (used ∪ usedFromEnv)
      simp only [Finset.mem_union, not_or] at hy
      refine ⟨y, hy.1, hy.2, ?_⟩
      intro hc
      have := Batteries.AssocList.contains_iff.mp hc
      simp only [Batteries.AssocList.MemKeys, Batteries.AssocList.keys] at this
      have : (x, y) ∈ ε.toList.map Prod.fst := by
        obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := this
        exact List.mem_map_of_mem Prod.fst hv
      have : y ∈ usedFromEnv := by
        simp only [Finset.mem_coe, List.mem_toFinset, List.mem_filterMap]
        exact ⟨(x, y), this, by simp⟩
      exact hy.2 this
    obtain ⟨y, hyused, _, hyenv⟩ := this
    refine ⟨y :: bs, by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro a' b' hmem
      simp only [List.zip_cons_cons, List.mem_cons] at hmem
      rcases hmem with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | hmem
      · exact hyenv
      · exact hnotcontains a' b' hmem
    · simp only [List.zip_cons_cons, List.nodup_cons]
      constructor
      · intro hmem
        have : y ∈ used := by
          simp only [Finset.mem_coe, List.mem_toFinset, List.mem_filterMap]
          exact ⟨(x, y), hmem, by simp⟩
        exact hyused this
      · exact hnodup

string s such that (hd, s) is not in ε and (hd, s) is not in zip tl b'
    let candidates := (ε.toList.map (·.1.2)) ++ (tl.zip b').map (·.2)
    let s := String.mk (List.replicate (candidates.map String.length |>.foldl max 0 + 1) 'x')
    use s :: b'
    refine ⟨by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro a' b'' hmem
      simp only [List.zip_cons_cons, List.mem_cons] at hmem
      rcases hmem with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | hmem
      · simp only [Batteries.AssocList.contains, Bool.not_eq_true, Batteries.AssocList.any_eq_false]
        intro p hp
        simp only [beq_iff_eq, not_and]
        intro heq
        have : s.length > (candidates.map String.length).foldl max 0 := by
          simp only [s, String.length_mk, List.length_replicate]
          omega
        have hs_long : s.length > p.1.2.length := by
          have : p.1.2 ∈ candidates := by simp [candidates]; left; exact ⟨p.1, p.2, hp, rfl⟩
          have := List.le_foldl_max _ _ _ (List.mem_map_of_mem String.length this)
          omega
        simp only [heq] at hs_long
        omega
      · exact hfresh a' b'' hmem
    · simp only [List.zip_cons_cons, List.nodup_cons]
      constructor
      · intro hmem
        have : s ∈ (tl.zip b').map (·.2) := List.mem_map_of_mem _ hmem
        have : s.length ≤ (candidates.map String.length).foldl max 0 := by
          have := List.le_foldl_max _ _ _ (List.mem_map_of_mem String.length (by simp [candidates]; right; exact this))
          exact this
        simp only [s, String.length_mk, List.length_replicate] at this
        omega
      · exact hnodup
sorry

string for hd
    -- Use a string that's definitely not in any existing pair
    let used : Finset String := 
      (ε.toList.map (·.1.2)).toFinset ∪ b'.toFinset
    obtain ⟨fresh, hfresh_not_in⟩ := Infinite.exists_not_mem_finset used
    refine ⟨fresh :: b', ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [hlen]
    · intro a' b'' hmem
      simp only [List.zip_cons_cons, List.mem_cons] at hmem
      cases hmem with
      | inl heq =>
        simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at heq
        obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := heq
        intro hcontra
        have : fresh ∈ used := by
          simp only [Finset.mem_union, List.mem_toFinset]
          left
          rw [Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq] at hcontra
          simp only [Batteries.AssocList.mem_toList] at hcontra
          exact List.mem_map_of_mem (·.1.2) hcontra
        exact hfresh_not_in this
      | inr hmem' => exact hfresh _ _ hmem'
    · simp only [List.zip_cons_cons, List.nodup_cons]
      constructor
      · intro hmem
        have : fresh ∈ b' := by
          have := List.mem_zip hmem
          exact this.2
        have : fresh ∈ used := by
          simp only [Finset.mem_union, List.mem_toFinset]
          right; exact this
        exact hfresh_not_in this
      · exact hnodup

some b' else none) |>.toFinset
    let usedInEnv : Finset String := 
      ε.toList.filterMap (fun (k, _) => if k.1 = x then some k.2 else none) |>.toFinset
    let allUsed := used ∪ usedInEnv
    have : ∃ y : String, y ∉ allUsed := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have : allUsed.Finite := Finset.finite_toSet _
      exact Finset.not_mem_empty "" (by
        have := Finset.eq_univ_iff_forall.mpr h
        simp only [Finset.univ_eq_empty] at this)
    obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := Infinite.exists_not_mem_finset allUsed
    refine ⟨y :: bs, by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro a' b' hmem
      simp only [List.zip_cons_cons, List.mem_cons] at hmem
      rcases hmem with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | hmem
      · simp only [Finset.mem_union, Finset.mem_toFinset, List.mem_filterMap] at hy
        push_neg at hy
        intro hcontra
        apply hy.2
        simp only [Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq, List.any_eq_true, 
          Batteries.AssocList.toList, decide_eq_true_eq] at hcontra
        obtain ⟨⟨k, v⟩, hmemε, heq⟩ := hcontra
        exact ⟨(k, v), hmemε, by simp [heq]⟩
